results.requirement_text: The system shall notify a user when their account email address is changed.

test_cases.title: Verify user receives notification after email address change
test_cases.objective: Confirm that the system notifies the user when their account email address is changed.
test_cases.technique_used: Functional test via UI/email change flow
preconditions: Configured prerequisites for exercising this capability are available.

steps.action: Change the account email address to a new valid email address.
steps.expected_result: The user receives a notification indicating that the email address has been changed.

test_cases.expected_result: The user receives a notification indicating that the email address has been changed.
assumptions: Notification delivery method is assumed to be configured appropriately.
Notification content/template is assumed to be defined.
